name: amass

documentation.readme: The OWASP Amass Project performs network mapping of attack surfaces and external asset discovery using open source information gathering and active reconnaissance techniques.
documentation.how_to_use: Clone or install `amass` from its upstream repository, then run `amass --help` (or the README entrypoint) to confirm flags.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'recon' phase against surfaces [web] in the OSINT category. Fits when the engagement needs: [![OWASP Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/owasp-amass/docs/master/images/owasp_logo.png) OWASP Amass Project](https://owasp.org/www-project-amass/).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: The OWASP Amass Project performs network mapping of attack surfaces and external asset discovery using open source information gathering and active reconnaissance techniques.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: When you need OSINT, use amass because [![OWASP Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/owasp-amass/docs/master/images/owasp_logo.png) OWASP Amass Project](https://owasp.org/www-project-amass/).
When the engagement is in the recon phase, use amass as a cataloged OSINT tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining OSINT tools, pair amass with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `amass --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
